name: GOLFTEC Pleasanton
about: GOLFTEC Pleasanton is a technology-driven golf training facility offering lessons, club fitting, and practice sessions. Utilizing advanced tools like OPTIMOTION swing tracking, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, the center provides data-driven feedback to improve swings and game performance. Services include private lessons with PGA-certified coaches, custom club fittings using launch monitors and shaft optimization, and access to training bays for practice. The venue is geared towards golfers seeking a structured, analytical approach to improvement, with options for one-time evaluations and ongoing lesson plans.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
PGA-certified coaches providing personalized game plans and feedback
Custom club fitting services to optimize equipment performance
Structured practice memberships with guided training plans

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food services provided
No information on alcohol services provided

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as a hardware product, but specific model not detailed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings, but you can bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided on food or drink policies outside of the pro shop.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Since GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice, not full simulated rounds, time varies by session type.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs and lessons, making it suitable for young golfers with proper coaching supervision.
